name: Brent Hinds
title: The last known photos of Brent Hinds are from a series he posted to his own Instagram on August 9, 2025, from The Nick in Birmingham, Alabama — just weeks before his death.
description: These photos were posted by Brent Hinds to his own Instagram on August 9, 2025, taken at The Nick, a legendary dive bar and music venue in Birmingham, Alabama. Eleven days later, on the night of August 20, 2025, Hinds died in a motorcycle accident in Birmingham when his motorcycle collided with an SUV. He was 51 years old. Co-founder and guitarist of the progressive metal band Mastodon, Hinds had announced his departure from the band earlier that year. His death came as a shock to the metal community, with tributes pouring in from bands and fans worldwide.
bio: Brent Hinds was an American musician best known as a co-founder, guitarist, and vocalist of the Atlanta-based progressive metal band Mastodon. Over more than two decades with the group, he helped shape the sound of modern heavy metal.

location.name: The Nick, 2514 10th Ave S, Birmingham, AL 35205
